params.name: Spinning Jenny
params.source: Lottery Machine (0.36%), Wishing (13.2%), Tool Chest (2%), Novice Scroll (5%)
params.description:
On Jun 12, 1764, James Hargreaves invented a new spinning machine with eight vertical spindles.

Looking at the spinning machine that toppled on the ground, he wondered if it could rotate 8 spindles if they were put vertically instead. That was how he increased the efficiency of a loom by eight times. This invention changed the industrial development. 

[Development]

5 years later, the hydraulic spinning machine was invented. 10 years later, the worsted spinning machine was invented. 40 later,  …
